ShaderNodePreset.Description: Animated Jumbotron-style LED screen texture filter.
ShaderNodePreset.Name: Greg Jumbotron

Uniform.Tooltip: Choose the output view.
Uniform.Name: output_mode

Uniform.Tooltip: Distance between LED cells in pixels.
Uniform.Name: pixel_pitch

Uniform.Tooltip: Size of each lit LED inside its cell.
Uniform.Name: led_size

Uniform.Tooltip: Darkness of the gaps between LED cells.
Uniform.Name: grid_darkness

Uniform.Tooltip: Strength of horizontal electronic scanlines.
Uniform.Name: scanline_strength

Uniform.Tooltip: Spacing of horizontal scanlines in pixels.
Uniform.Name: scanline_spacing

Uniform.Tooltip: Amount of red/green/blue subpixel striping within each LED.
Uniform.Name: triad_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-cell animated brightness variation.
Uniform.Name: flicker_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Animate this value to move scanlines, flicker, and the refresh band.
Uniform.Name: animation_phase

Uniform.Tooltip: Brightness of a rolling electronic refresh band.
Uniform.Name: refresh_band

Uniform.Tooltip: Width of the rolling refresh band.
Uniform.Name: refresh_width

Uniform.Tooltip: Fine interference pattern for filmed-screen texture.
Uniform.Name: moire_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Soft glow from bright screen edges.
Uniform.Name: edge_bloom

Uniform.Tooltip: Contrast before the LED texture is applied.
Uniform.Name: contrast

Uniform.Tooltip: Saturation before the LED texture is applied.
Uniform.Name: saturation

Uniform.Tooltip: Brightness before the LED texture is applied.
Uniform.Name: brightness

Uniform.Tooltip: Blend between the source and the Jumbotron composite.
Uniform.Name: mix_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Pass source alpha through unchanged.
Uniform.Name: preserve_alpha

Uniform.Tooltip: Amount of fake glossy reflection added over the screen. Set to 0 to turn it off.
Uniform.Name: reflection_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Vertical position of the main reflection band before angle is applied.
Uniform.Name: reflection_position

Uniform.Tooltip: Width and softness of the main reflection band.
Uniform.Name: reflection_width

Uniform.Tooltip: Angle of the fake reflection. Values are rotations in turns.
Uniform.Name: reflection_angle

Uniform.Tooltip: Amount of fine streaks and glints in the reflection.
Uniform.Name: reflection_streaks

Uniform.Tooltip: Adds a slight cool blue tint to the reflection.
Uniform.Name: reflection_tint

Uniform.Tooltip: Image to receive the Jumbotron screen texture.
Uniform.Name: input1
